Title: Successful Account Creation
Preconditions: User has an Android device with internet connectivity and meets minimum hardware requirements.
Test Data: Valid email, strong password, full name, address, phone number
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Create Account" option.
2. Enter valid email address in the email field.
3. Enter a strong password in the password field.
4. Re-enter the same password in the confirm password field.
5. Enter full name in the name field.
6. Enter address in the address field.
7. Enter phone number in the phone number field.
8. Select "Create Account" button.
Expected Result: Account is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the login page with a confirmation message.

Title: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User has an existing account in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Login" option.
2. Enter registered email address in the email field.
3. Enter correct password in the password field.
4. Select "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home page.

Title: Failed Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User has an existing account in the system.
Test Data: Valid registered email and incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Login" option.
2. Enter registered email address in the email field.
3. Enter incorrect password in the password field.
4. Select "Login" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message "Invalid email or password" and user remains on the login page.

Title: Successful Account Creation
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device, internet connection available
Test Data: Valid username, email, password, personal details (date of birth, residence, quarter, housing type, family nucleus)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time after installation.
2. Fill in the form with username, email, and password.
3. Insert personal details: date of birth, residence, quarter, housing type, family nucleus.
4. Confirm and submit the information.
Expected Result: A confirmation screen appears indicating successful registration.

Title: Duplicate Account Creation Error
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device, internet connection available, an existing account with the same username/email
Test Data: Username and email matching an existing account, valid password, personal details
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time after installation.
2. Fill in the form with username, email, and password matching an existing account.
3. Insert personal details.
4. Confirm and submit the information.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the account already exists.

Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: Account created, internet connection available
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Enter email and password in the login form.
3. Confirm and submit the information.
Expected Result: User is logged in and granted access to application functionalities.

Title: Failed Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: Account created, internet connection available
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Enter incorrect email or password in the login form.
3. Confirm and submit the information.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, prompting user to recheck credentials and retry.

Title: Auto-Login with Valid Token
Preconditions: User previously logged in, valid token stored on device
Test Steps: 1. Open the application after a prior successful login.
Expected Result: User is automatically logged in without re-entering credentials.

Title: Access Segnalazioni Page
Preconditions: User logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Select the option to access the Segnalazioni page.
Expected Result: List of neighborhood reports is displayed, with an option to create new reports.

Title: Create New Report
Preconditions: User logged in, on Segnalazioni page
Test Steps:

2. Fill in the report description.
3. Select the report category.
4. Enter the associated location.
5. Confirm and submit the information.
Expected Result: Report is created, and a notification is sent to all neighborhood users.

Title: Duplicate Report Submission Error
Preconditions: User logged in, on Segnalazioni page, previous report not expired

Test Steps:

2. Fill in the same details as a recent report.
3. Confirm and submit the information.

Title: Logout from Application
Preconditions: User is logged in with a valid token.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the logout option.
2. Confirm logout.
Expected Result: The user's token is invalidated, and the user is redirected to the login page.

Title: Automatic Logout Due to Inactivity
Preconditions: User is logged in with a valid token.
Test Steps: 1. Leave the application idle for a period longer than the predefined inactivity timeout.
Expected Result: The user's token is automatically invalidated, and the user is redirected to the login page.

Title: Verify presence of usage instructions on the main app page
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened on a device
Test Steps:
1. Open the application on the main page.
2. Locate the section labeled "istruzioni sull’utilizzo dell’applicazione" or similar.
Expected Result: Instructions for using the application are clearly visible and accessible.

Title: Verify accessibility for color-blind users
Preconditions: Application is installed on a device
Test Steps:
1. Simulate color blindness (e.g., using a color blindness filter or tool).
2. Navigate through the application’s main features and UI elements.
Expected Result: All critical UI elements remain distinguishable and usable without confusion.

Title: Verify application response time
Preconditions: Application is installed and connected to the internet
Test Steps:
1. Perform a standard action (e.g., login, data retrieval, or navigation).
2. Measure the time taken from action initiation to completion.
Expected Result: The action completes within 4 seconds.

Title: Verify minimum installation storage requirement
Preconditions: None
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to install the application on a device with less than 100MB free storage.
Expected Result: Installation fails with an error indicating insufficient storage.

Title: Verify correct installation on device
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Download and install the application on a compatible Android device.
2. Verify the app icon appears on the device’s home screen or app drawer.
3. Open the application and confirm it launches without errors.
Expected Result: Application is installed correctly and launches successfully.

Title: Verify data deletion upon uninstallation
Preconditions: Application is installed and user data is saved
Test Steps:
1. Save sample user data within the application.
2. Uninstall the application from the device.
3. Check if any residual data files or folders remain in the device’s storage.
Expected Result: All saved user data is permanently deleted upon uninstallation.

Title: Verify secure database connection (HTTPS/TLS ≥1.0)
Preconditions: Application is connected to the server
Test Data: Network traffic monitoring tool (e.g., Wireshark, Charles Proxy)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application and perform an action requiring server communication (e.g., login).
2. Monitor the network traffic to inspect the connection protocol.
Expected Result: The connection uses HTTPS with TLS version ≥1.0.

Title: Verify compatibility with Android 7.0+
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android emulator or device with Android 7.0+
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device running Android 7.0 or higher.
2. Attempt to use basic and advanced features of the application.
Expected Result: Application installs and functions correctly without errors.

Title: Verify requirement for constant internet connection
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened
Test Steps:
1. Enable internet connection on the device.
2. Perform an action requiring server communication (e.g., login, data sync).
3. Disable the internet connection and repeat the action.
Expected Result: Action succeeds with internet enabled; fails or shows an error with internet disabled.

Title: Verify right to erasure upon account deletion
Preconditions: User account is created and data is saved
Test Data: User account credentials and sample data
Test Steps:
1. Create a user account and save sample data (e.g., profile, activity logs).
2. Delete the user account from the application.
3. Verify with server/database that all user-specific data is removed.
Expected Result: All personal data associated with the account is permanently deleted.

Title: Verify GDPR compliance
Preconditions: Application is installed and user data is processed
Test Data: Sample user data including personal information
Test Steps:
1. Collect and process sample user data (e.g., name, email, preferences).
2. Request data export or deletion as per GDPR guidelines.
3. Verify compliance with data protection measures (e.g., encryption, consent management).
Expected Result: Application adheres to GDPR requirements for data handling, including export, deletion, and protection.

Title: New Account Creation

Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time.
2. Click on the "Create Account" button on the initial screen.
3. Fill in the registration form with valid personal information and credentials.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: A confirmation message "Registrazione avvenuta" is displayed, followed by the login screen.

Title: Database Connection Validation
Preconditions: PostgreSQL server is installed and running
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to connect the application to the PostgreSQL database.
2. Verify database tables for user accounts, reports, needs, and services are accessible.
Expected Result: Connection succeeds, all required tables are accessible and readable.

Title: Data Privacy and Security Validation
Preconditions: PostgreSQL database is populated with sample user data
Test Data: Sample user data (name, email, account details)
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to read or modify user data without proper authentication.
2. Attempt to delete user data without proper authorization.
Expected Result: System denies unauthorized access or modifications; data integrity remains intact.

Title: Minimum Android OS Version Validation
Preconditions: Android emulator or device with Android 7.0 installed
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device running Android 7.0.
2. Launch the application and perform basic operations (e.g., login, navigation).
Expected Result: Application installs successfully and runs without crashes or errors.

Title: Minimum RAM Requirement Validation
Preconditions: Android device with exactly 1GB RAM
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device with 1GB RAM.
2. Open multiple app features simultaneously (e.g., reports, needs, services).
3. Monitor app performance for lag or crashes.
Expected Result: Application runs fluently without significant lag or crashes.

Title: Minimum Storage Requirement Validation
Preconditions: Android device with exactly 100MB free storage
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to install the application on a device with 100MB free storage.
2. Verify installation completes without errors.
Expected Result: Application installs successfully without storage-related errors.

Title: Internet Connectivity Requirement Validation
Preconditions: Android device with and without internet connectivity
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to launch the application without internet connectivity.
2. Attempt to perform operations requiring server interaction (e.g., submitting a report).
Expected Result: Application launches but blocks operations requiring internet; user receives appropriate error message.
